description: An outdoor photograph on an airport tarmac showing a row of officers standing with their backs to the camera, facing a small twin-engine private aircraft. A man in a yellow shirt and dark shorts stands among them near the aircraft door, his arms held behind him. The officers wear jackets and vests with lettering including POLICE HSI, INTERPOL PANAMA, Policia Nacional D.I.J., and UFEC. A commercial airliner is parked at a hangar in the left background under a cloudy sky.
notable_text: POLICE HSI; INTERPOL PANAMA; Policia Nacional D.I.J.; UFEC
